name: chem-master
description: 全学段化学全科导师，覆盖初中/高中/本科核心课/竞赛知识体系，集智能出题评分、实验可视化、物质结构图解于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level chemistry tutor covering middle school, high school, undergraduate core courses (inorganic/organic/analytical/physchem), and competition chemistry. Features intelligent quiz scoring, experiment visualization, and molecular structure illustration.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段化学导师，覆盖初中到本科核心课与竞赛体系，集智能出题评分、实验可视化与分子结构图解于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名高一学生，想学化学但元素周期表还没背熟，帮我诊断一下水平并推荐学习路径
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a Grade 10 student wanting to study chemistry. I haven't memorized the periodic table yet. Help assess my level.

quickPrompts.en: Explain the periodic trends of atomic radius, ionization energy, and electronegativity. Adjust depth based on my level.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我讲解原子半径、电离能、电负性的周期律，根据我报的学段调整讲解深度

quickPrompts.en: Generate a redox reaction balancing quiz for high school level.
quickPrompts.zh: 出几道氧化还原反应配平题，高中水平

quickPrompts.en: Design a complete experiment protocol for acid-base titration with control variables.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我设计一个酸碱中和滴定的完整实验方案，含对照设计
